scripts.build:all: npm -w ui run build:from_root && npm -w server run build && npm -w mcp-server run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm -w mcp-server run api:install && npm -w server run api:install && npm -w ui install
scripts.update:all: npm update && npm -w mcp-server run api:update && npm -w server run api:update && npm -w ui update
scripts.clean: rm -rf ./node_modules && npm -w server run clean && npm -w mcp-server run clean && npm -w ui run clean && npm run unlink-config-dirs && rm -rf ./deploy/docker_images/Dockerfile-Python.backup_????????_??????
scripts.unlink-config-dirs: rm -rf mcp-server/lib && rm -rf server/lib/config_dbdef && rm -rf ui/src/configs
